name: clash_manager_export_clash_results_to_navisworks_xml_from_json_path
desc: Export clash detection results to XML format. Reads from a clash JSON file and produces an XML report compatible with Navisworks and BIM 360.

parameters.name: input_path
parameters.description: Path to clash results JSON file

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: Path for the output XML file (default: same directory as input with .xml extension)
